observed_failure_pattern: Closed-posture action was promoted from a single 10-second window even though the visible frames show an upright open stance and the report had no Qwen corroboration.
precision_rule_to_apply: Require sustained multi-window evidence before naming posture problems.

observed_failure_pattern: Same closed-posture action persisted after the config change, showing the problem is prompt-level overconfidence rather than a one-off rendering glitch.
precision_rule_to_apply: Only promote a correction if the evidence survives a second-pass check.

observed_failure_pattern: A 5-second clip still produced a high-confidence affect correction, even though the short span should have made generalization much less certain.
precision_rule_to_apply: Short clips should default to confidence_notes or watch_for, not priority_actions.

observed_failure_pattern: Manual review warns that this is a face/screen/props mix with very low pose, face, and hand coverage, so eye-contact and affect claims are unstable.
precision_rule_to_apply: If coverage is low, cap claims to visible posture or orientation only.

observed_failure_pattern: Manual review notes that screen recording may reduce face coverage; hand evidence is nearly absent, so gesture claims are under-supported.
precision_rule_to_apply: Treat screen-recording clips as low-gesture-evidence regimes.

observed_failure_pattern: Face and hand coverage are both below full reliability, so eye-contact and affect strengths should stay provisional even when the body-level pattern looks stable.
precision_rule_to_apply: Treat eye-contact and affect as provisional when coverage is only moderate.

observed_failure_pattern: Low hand coverage plus large motion spikes can create an over-animated story that exceeds the visual evidence.
precision_rule_to_apply: Use a watch_for item unless the motion issue is visible across multiple windows.

observed_failure_pattern: High excessive-animation risk can dominate the narrative even though the clip is still upright and reasonably distributed across the room.
precision_rule_to_apply: Require a visible motion pattern across windows before warning about over-animation.
